news.t: GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST FoFs ETFs: YBST and YBTY
GraniteShares Announces the Launch of Two New YieldBOOST Fund-of-Funds ETFs

overview.description: The GraniteShares YieldBoost TopYielders ETF (YBTY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that invests in the best-performing YieldBOOST ETFs. The underlying ETFs seek to provide current income and capped gains on select securities through a put option writing strategy. YBTY was launched on Dec 16, 2025 and is issued by GraniteShares.

data.title: GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST FoFs ETFs: YBST and YBTY
data.text: New York, June 18, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- GraniteShares today announced the weekly distributions for its GraniteShares YieldBOOST FoFs ETFs: YBST and YBTY as shown in the table below.
